metadata.title: Italy EOR Services | Employer of Record Italy – Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: Italy EOR and Employer of Record Italy services. Hire employees in Italy without entity. Italian employment laws 2026, Italy payroll outsourcing, INPS INAIL compliance, visa support. Onboard in 2–3 days. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in Italy without entity

faqs.title: Italy EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in Italy.

items.question: How much does Italy EOR cost?
items.answer: Italy EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus the cost of salary, benefits, employer INPS (social security), INAIL (workplace injury insurance), and taxes. At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Total cost depends on headcount, salary levels, and benefits. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in Italy with EOR?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank Italy EOR, you can onboard new hires in 2–3 business days once we have signed contracts and employee details. No local entity (S.r.l./S.p.A.) is required, so you avoid months of setup time.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in Italy without an entity?
items.answer: When you use a compliant Italy EOR like Jackson & Frank, the EOR is the legal employer in Italy. They assume employment law, INPS/INAIL, tax (IRPEF, IRAP), and compliance risk. You avoid misclassification, permanent establishment, and local registration issues as long as you work with a licensed, established provider.

items.question: What type of employment contract does Italy EOR use?
items.answer: Employees are hired under an Italian employment contract (contratto di lavoro) compliant with Italian labor law (Codice del Lavoro) and applicable CCNL (collective bargaining agreements), including notice periods, probation, leave entitlements, and mandatory INPS/INAIL contributions. Jackson & Frank issues the contract from our Italian entity so it is fully local and enforceable.

items.question: Can you sponsor visas for Italy EOR employees?
items.answer: Yes. We support visa sponsorship and work permits (Nulla Osta, Permesso di Soggiorno) in Italy, plus coordination with immigration authorities (Sportello Unico per l'Immigrazione, Questura), so you can hire non-EU talent through our Italy EOR.
